news.t: Dow-linked ETFs lower one day after overhaul announcement

holdings.infoBox: DDM is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Dow30 (DDM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the price-weighted Dow Jones Industrial Average, which includes 30 of the largest and most stable US companies. DDM was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.text: Dow-linked ETFs lower one day after overhaul announcement Exchange-traded funds tracking the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, -0.47% turned in a mixed performance one day after a big shakeup to the ...
